A.5.name: Information Security Policies
A.5.description: Management direction and support for information security.

A.8.1.name: Responsibility for Assets
A.8.1.description: Assets associated with information shall be identified and an inventory maintained.
A.8.1.remediation: Maintain documentation of code assets and ownership

A.9.2.3.name: Management of Privileged Access Rights
A.9.2.3.description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and controlled.
A.9.2.3.remediation: Enable branch protection, require PR reviews for privileged branches
A.9.2.3.business_impact: Unrestricted access can lead to unauthorized code execution

A.9.4.1.name: Information Access Restriction
A.9.4.1.description: Access to information and application system functions shall be restricted.
A.9.4.1.remediation: Remove secrets from code, use secret management

A.12.5.1.name: Installation of Software
A.12.5.1.description: Rules governing the installation of software by users shall be established.
A.12.5.1.remediation: Configure Dependabot for automated dependency management

A.12.6.1.name: Management of Technical Vulnerabilities
A.12.6.1.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities shall be obtained and evaluated.
A.12.6.1.remediation: Enable security scanning, configure Dependabot alerts

A.14.2.2.name: System Change Control Procedures
A.14.2.2.description: Changes to systems shall be controlled by formal change control procedures.
A.14.2.2.remediation: Require pull requests and code reviews for all changes

A.16.1.1.name: Responsibilities and Procedures
A.16.1.1.description: Management responsibilities and procedures shall ensure a quick and effective response to incidents.
A.16.1.1.remediation: Create SECURITY.md with vulnerability disclosure procedures

A.18.1.2.name: Intellectual Property Rights
A.18.1.2.description: Appropriate procedures shall be implemented to ensure compliance with legal requirements.
A.18.1.2.remediation: Add LICENSE file, ensure dependency license compliance
